title: TrashSlot Blacklist Addon
description: This mod adds blacklist functionality to the TrashSlot mod, allowing to autotrash useless items.
body:
[![Reguires: Fabric API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/475b798f6a4c2bdb115d1a3529bb44ac782e7352.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Reguires: Trashslot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e30e85f118f1a351d0138676a185c70ca0c5e571.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot)
[![Reguires: Balm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7abc440e6ec88d7a9c3b6a858fa84fc85bb3f60d.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm)

---

Client-side mod, that adds a new hotkey for blacklisting items, by default **~** key (tilde). When item is blacklisted, it gets automatically moved in trashslot when picked up from the ground.
RMB to remove items from blacklist.

![Blacklist grid ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e842cef684410ceb28b11c0a295e9ba04d7bf55.png)
